commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bot mention metadata to synthetic Feishu group card-action callbacks when `botOpenId` is known and adds group/p2p regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main synthesizes Feishu group card-action messages without `message.mentions`, while the group ingress gate dispatches only when `ctx.mentionedBot` satisfies `requireMention`. I did not run a live Feishu reproduction in this read-only review.

target.title: Fix Feishu card action mention gating
target.body:
Fixes #85450.

## Summary

- Mark Feishu synthetic group card-action callbacks with bot mention metadata when `botOpenId` is known.
- Keep p2p card callbacks unchanged so direct-message callbacks do not gain synthetic mentions.
- Add regression coverage for both the group mention metadata and the p2p no-mention behavior.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Feishu structured card button callbacks in `requireMention: true` group chats were synthesized as group text messages without bot mention metadata, so the existing group activation gate could treat the callback as not addressing the bot and drop it. After this patch, synthetic group card callbacks include a bot mention entry when `botOpenId` is available, while p2p callbacks still omit synthetic mentions.

Real environment tested: Local macOS OpenClaw checkout at `/Users/googlerest/.openclaw/workspace/openclaw-src`, branch `codex/fix-85450-feishu-card-mention`, commit `2482f7f442 Fix Feishu card action mention gating`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/bot.card-action.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/policy.test.ts
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix: Terminal output copied from the local OpenClaw checkout:

```text
RUN  v4.1.6 /Users/googlerest/.openclaw/workspace/openclaw-src

Test Files  3 passed (3)
     Tests  102 passed (102)
  Start at  02:24:43
  Duration  3.34s (transform 1.01s, setup 33ms, import 2.34s, tests 843ms, environment 0ms)
```

Observed result after fix: The Feishu card-action regression now asserts that a synthetic group callback has `message.chat_type === "group"` and includes `mentions: [{ key: "mention_bot", id: { open_id: "ou_bot" }, name: "bot" }]`. The same suite also asserts that p2p card callbacks keep `message.mentions` undefined. The broader Feishu bot and policy regression files passed with the same patch. `git diff --check` completed with no output.

What was not tested: I did not run a live Feishu group chat card click because this local environment does not have live Feishu credentials.
target.author: googlerest
